title: Esnupicraft
description: Friend group modpack with tons of mods and diffirent versions
body:
# Esnupimon

![Lotad and Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9GsmeIek/images/4a75f49677b54bbb060d1df8993b902221c00ebb.webp)

A modpack focused around Cobblemon and its many addon mods. Fight other trainers (including gym leaders), fight your friends, and catch 'em all!

## Light story elements
You set out on a journey, away from home. Mom left you a letter in your bag.

## Focus on the fun
This modpack disables monster spawns above Y level 58, so no creepers or zombies will be harassing you while you're out there trying to catch shinies.

![That's a hat!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9GsmeIek/images/c72a838e2059fd82179fbcc2302db673d3628017.webp)

## Cozy Games Approved
This modpack features Farmer's Delight, as well as Biomes O' Plenty, Macaw's mods and many others including many QOL mods. Collect all the plushies!
